method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Stop correlation high (0.71) from shared zones 4/7, but purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Dril_Blast), route similarity near zero, and 1247's higher daily distance (153 km) reduce overall similarity. Purpose difference is significant.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; moderate age and kms similarity; duty match.

1311.llm_rationale: Purpose mismatch (Production), negative stop correlation (-0.21) due to disjoint zones (1311 zone6, no zone4/7), route similarity low. Kms similarity high but daily distance vastly different. Very low similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative (-0.21) due to different zone profiles.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; kms similar; age somewhat similar; duty match.

1312.llm_rationale: High stop correlation (0.71) because both emphasize zone7, but purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Production), extremely low route similarity, and vastly different daily distance (155: 42 km, 1312: 285 km). Purpose and distance gap keep similarity moderate despite zone profile alignment.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High (0.71) due to zone7 dominance in normalization.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose; kms similar; age moderately different; duty match.

1350.llm_rationale: Both Mobile_Eq with matching duty, but 1350's daily distance (mean 141 km) and zone activity (27 passes, broad zones) far exceed 155's low-intensity operation (42 km, 5 passes). Route similarity near zero. Stop correlation (0.57) overstates due to low-activity overlap.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate (0.57) but 155's sparse zone data weaken reliability.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose and duty; age moderately different; kms somewhat similar.

1363.llm_rationale: Both low daily distance (155 42 km, 1363 57 km) with some zone overlap (4,7). Stop correlation 0.64, purpose mismatch (Rail), kms very different, route low. Operational closeness in distance and speed (27.5 vs 18.4) lifts similarity moderately above the purely statistical score.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; kms mismatch; age close; duty match.

1421.llm_rationale: Same Mobile_Eq purpose/duty, stop correlation moderate (0.49), but route similarity insignificant, and daily distance (168 km) is four times 155's. Zone pattern includes zone8 absent from 155. Similarity limited to basic fleet metadata and moderate zone overlap.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate (0.49); both have zones 4,7, but 1421 adds zone8.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose, duty, similar kms; age moderately different.

1423.llm_rationale: Similar to 1311: purpose mismatch, negative stop correlation, route low. Both have very different zone usage and operating scale. Negligible similarity despite moderate kms and age overlaps.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; kms high similarity; age close; duty match.

1506.llm_rationale: Duty cycle mismatch (AMBULANCE vs MEDIUM), purpose mismatch (Support), stop correlation zero (no shared zone pattern), route similarity relatively highest (0.19) but still low. No meaningful operational similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Higher than other pairs (0.19) but still low.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle mismatch; moderate age similarity; low kms similarity.

1575.llm_rationale: Stop correlation 0.65, kms almost identical, but purpose mismatch (Production) and 1575's much higher daily distance (262 km vs 42 km). Route similarity nearly zero. Strong fleet kms similarity not enough to overcome operational intensity differences.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; kms near identical; age moderately different; duty match.

1576.llm_rationale: Same purpose/duty and moderate stop-profile similarity, but route images almost completely dissimilar, age gap wide, and daily distance intensity differs (155 ~42 km, 1576 ~100 km). Stop correlation based on low pass counts likely overstates functional similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate (0.63) but both have limited passes; 155 has only 5 total passes vs 16 for 1576, so correlation may be inflated.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Very low (0.048); representative route shapes differ.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; age difference large; kms moderate similarity.

1578.llm_rationale: Stop correlation high (0.68) because of zone7 dominance, but purpose mismatch (Production vs Mobile_Eq) and enormous daily distance gap (155: 42 km, 1578: 331 km). Kms similarity high, yet operating intensity and role are fundamentally different, reducing similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose different; kms very similar; age gap; duty match.

1667.llm_rationale: Stop correlation zero (1667 has no zone passes), purpose mismatch (Rail vs Mobile_Eq), route similarity low, moderate kms similarity. Overall very low similarity; only duty cycle and some kms link them.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; moderate kms similarity; low age similarity; duty match.

1687.llm_rationale: Both low daily distance (155 42 km, 1687 62 km) and share zone7, but purpose mismatch (Production) and very limited zone passes (4 vs 5). Stop correlation moderate (0.45), route low. Kms highly different. Similarity limited to low-intensity profiles.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; low kms similarity; age somewhat similar; duty match.

1688.llm_rationale: Same Mobile_Eq purpose/duty but zone behaviour completely opposite: 1688 operates exclusively in zone2 with zero zone7 passes, while 155 uses zones 4,7. Negative stop correlation (-0.12), route similarity higher but still low. Purpose match prevents near-zero correlation.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative (-0.12) due to disjoint zone usage.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose and duty; age and kms moderately similar.

1785.llm_rationale: Same purpose/duty, but stop correlation negative (-0.17) because 1785 is focused on zone3, absent in 155. Distance regimes differ (155 low, 1785 medium). Very low similarity despite fleet metadata match.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative (-0.17) due to zone3 focus vs zones 4,7.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose and duty; moderate kms similarity; age gap.

1993.llm_rationale: Very high stop-profile correlation (0.86) despite purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Tech_services). Both share dominant zones 4 & 7 with limited other zones. Route similarity low, distance regimes differ (155 low, 1993 medium), but strong zone behavior alignment keeps similarity moderate-high.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High (0.86) because normalized zone vectors align well; both concentrate passes in zones 4,7.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and kms differ, age gap significant; duty cycle same.

2191.llm_rationale: Stop correlation moderate (0.63) and kms high similarity, but purpose mismatch (Production) and daily distance gap (155: 42 km, 2191: 284 km) indicate very different usage. Route similarity negligible. Overall similarity below average.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; kms similar; low age similarity; duty match.

2201.llm_rationale: High stop correlation (0.74) with shared zones 4,7 and some zone2, but purpose mismatch (Tech_services), low route similarity, and moderate distance difference (155 ~42 km, 2201 ~92 km). Age and kms similarity low. Overall moderate similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose different; low age and kms similarity; duty match.

2518.llm_rationale: High stop correlation (0.74) but purpose mismatch (Dril_Blast), route similarity low, 2518 has moderate distance (152 km) and heavy zone4 use (30 passes). 155's low activity contrasts. Purpose and intensity difference lower overall similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose different; low age and kms similarity; duty match.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
